titleStmt.title: SII 8.400: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 400. (A.R. No. 114 of 1903). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakābtam 10 296- ṉ mel śrīmanma hāma ṇṭalicuraṉ harirāyavibhā ṭaṉ bhāṣai kkutappum Irāyarkaṇṭaṉ śrīvīrakampaṇauṭaiyarkku cellāniṉṟa Āṉantavaruṣam Aṟpacimātam 4
nāṭāka tiruppullāṇiyile kuvintu kāṅkeyaṉ tirumaṇṭapattiliruntu nāyaṉār teyvaccilaipperumāḷukku tiruppaṇikkum nāṭṭār kaṟpitta Ucciccantikkum Amutupaṭikkum paṭiveñcaṉa
ttukkum cāttuppaṭikkum tirumālaikkum nāṭṭil vaittukkuṭutta brāhma ṇar per Oṉṟukku paṇam Oṉṟum veḷḷāḷar per Oṉṟukkup paṇam Oṉṟum nāṭṭil Irukkum
ceṭṭiyaṉ per Oṉṟukku paṇam Oṉṟum tavacikaḷ kaikkoḷar maṟṟuḷḷiṭṭa cātikku per Oṉṟukku paṇam Oṉṟum veḷḷāṉpiḷḷaikaḷ Iṭaiyar kaṇṇāḷar Ivarka ḷuḷḷi
ṭṭa cātikku per Oṉṟukku paṇam Araiyum cāṉṟā ruḷḷiṭṭa cātikku per Oṉṟukku paṇam Araiyumāka paṉṉiraṇṭu vayasu kku meṟpaṭṭāriyāvaṟku māṇṭutoṟu miṟukkum Irācakarattukku vaḻaṅkum paṇam
Āka tiruveḷaikkāṟaraikkoṇṭu taṇṭuvittukkoḷvārkaḷākavu mimmutal maṟitttukkuṭuttu(n) nda ṇṭittun taṇṭikkoḷvārkaḷākavu mippaṭikku candrāditya vaṟ cella kalluveṭṭik kuṭuttamaikku .
Digital edition of SII 8.400 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
